CoopSpectator client package

Install:
1. Open your Mount & Blade II Bannerlord game root.
2. Extract this archive directly into the game root.
3. Confirm that these paths now exist:
   Modules\CoopSpectator\SubModule.xml
   Modules\CoopSpectator\bin\Win64_Shipping_Client\CoopSpectator.dll
   run_mp_with_mod_from_game_root.bat
4. Start the game with run_mp_with_mod_from_game_root.bat

Expected game root example:
C:\Program Files (x86)\Steam\steamapps\common\Mount & Blade II Bannerlord

Notes:
- Do not place the .bat inside Modules.
- Do not create an extra nested folder like Modules\CoopSpectator\CoopSpectator.
- This package does not require a separate Bannerlord.Harmony module.
